title: Circular Logic Resolution
description: Extract 'VERSION' and 'STATUS' constants from 'app.py' and 'utils.py' into a new 'constants.py' file to resolve circular dependencies.
test_script:
import unittest
import constants
import app
import utils

class TestConstants(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_values(self):
        self.assertEqual(constants.VERSION, '1.0.0')
        self.assertEqual(app.VERSION, '1.0.0')
        self.assertEqual(utils.VERSION, '1.0.0')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()
